title: Goroutine Pools, Context Causes, Backpressure, and Shutdown · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent community information owner supplies a different origin, HTML structure, rate contract, accessibility need, resource ceiling, and injected failure and transfers goroutine pools, context causes, backpressure, and shutdown into a changed bounded leak-free Go crawl pipeline. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of bounded leak-free Go crawl pipeline with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case p…
objectives: Bound frontier, workers, open bodies, parser memory, report buffers, files, and browser-service requests with end-to-end backpressure.
Assign channel creation, senders, receiver, closer, buffering rationale, and cancellation behavior without double close or blocked send.
Derive owner, run, item, attempt, deadline, and shutdown contexts and preserve the first meaningful cancellation cause.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Work Budget Chain
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 4844 during a keyboard-first accessible report review. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove multiresource backpressure, channel ownership, context causes, error aggregation, and graceful join; every URL, body, tree, record, frontier transition, and report row retains causal identity; then change one owner, seed, net/url, robots, sitemap, redirect, DNS, transport, media, or charset condition and reconcile provenance. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Bound frontier, workers, open bodies, parser memory, report buffers, files, and browser-service requests with end-to-end backpressure.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Work Budget Chain.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for bound frontier, workers, open bodies, parser memory, report buffers, files, and browser-service requests with end-to-end backpressure. For Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Work Budget Chain, keep Work Budget Chain connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
